title: Nami Faces Enel
description: Nami is forced to confront Enel directly, realizing how terrifying his lightning power and control over Skypiea truly are.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 4, 5, this scene centers on Enel, Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall. Nami is forced to confront Enel directly, realizing how terrifying his lightning power and control over Skypiea truly are.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The ground is sort of tilted!

summary: Nami is forced to confront Enel directly, realizing how terrifying his lightning power and control over Skypiea truly are.
